title: Open a presentation
prompt: Give a short opening for a presentation about teamwork.
reference_text: Good morning everyone. Today I will explain why teamwork improves results in modern companies.

title: Summarise findings
prompt: Summarise research findings in a formal tone.
reference_text: Our research indicates that consistent feedback leads to measurable performance gains.

title: Close with a call to action
prompt: End a presentation by asking the audience to take one clear action.
reference_text: In conclusion, I encourage you to adopt these practices in your next project review.
